zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Gifford於1392年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安牛頓 維利亞時，她的父親James Gifford of Sherifhall19歲，母親Beatrice Gordon22歲。她於1417年與James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith在蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年9月8日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Gifford于1392年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安牛頓 維利亞时，她的父亲James Gifford of Sherifhall19岁，母亲Beatrice Gordon22岁。她于1417年与James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith在苏格兰度福利爾莫頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年9月8日在苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Gifford was born in 1392, in Newton Village, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James Gifford of Sherifhall, was 19 and her mother, Beatrice Gordon, was 22. She married James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith in 1417, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 September 1456, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 64, and was buried in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Gifford est née en 1392, à Newton Village, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Gifford of Sherifhall, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Gordon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith en 1417, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1456, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Gifford 1392 in Newton Village, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Gifford of Sherifhall 19 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Gordon 22. Sie hat 1417 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. September 1456 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Gifford è nata il nel 1392 nel Newton Village, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Gifford of Sherifhall, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Gordon, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith nel 1417, nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1456, nel Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Giffordが1392年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンニュートン ヴィラッジで生まれた時，父James Gifford of Sherifhallは19歳，母Beatrice Gordonは22歳であった。1417年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモートンでJames II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年9月8日にスコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスで64歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Gifford(이)가 1392년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 뉴턴 비라지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Gifford of Sherifhall(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Gordon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1417년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 9월 8일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Gifford nasceu em 1392, em Newton Village, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Gifford of Sherifhall, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Gordon, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith em 1417, em Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1456, em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Gifford родилась в 1392 г. в местности нютон вилладж, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Gifford of Sherifhall было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Gordon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith в 1417 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 сентября 1456 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Gifford nació en 1392, en Newton Village, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, James Gifford of Sherifhall, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Beatrice Gordon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con James II Douglas, Lord of Dalkeith en 1417, en Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1456, en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland.
